---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in DarkTowerSync
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or console output.

## Platform Info

- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15.3, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **Package version**: (run `npm ls dark-tower-sync` or check package.json)
- **Package**: (host / client / shared)

## Tower Hardware Info

- **Tower firmware version**: (visible in the official companion app)
- **BLE adapter / dongle**: (e.g., built-in macOS, Plugable USB BLE dongle)
- **Companion app platform**: (e.g., iPhone via iPhone Mirroring, Android via Phone Link)

## Browser Info (client package only)

- **Browser & version**: (e.g., Chrome 124, Edge 124)
- **Web Bluetooth API available**: (open DevTools console, run `'bluetooth' in navigator`)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or logs that might help.
